pi_items.source: Task description and verifier scripts directly check for BlenderBIM (Bonsai) drawing output logic (SVG generation) and IFC annotation metadata.
Task description and execution scripts confirm these tags are highly relevant to generating an SVG floor plan from an IFC model using Bonsai.
Task operates on building architecture data (FZK-Haus).
task.json, setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicitly specify and check for this file path.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for blenderbim_env floor_plan_drawing_generation task. Verified that the data is the real FZK-Haus sample architectural model downloaded from ifcwiki.org. Confirmed the target 'Erdgeschoss' storey exists within the model and contains multiple IfcWall, IfcDoor, and IfcWindow entities necessary for semantic verification. Also verified that the expected output IFC path '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_with_drawings.ifc' and SVG output complexity requirements exactly match the task description and verifier.py logic.
